case_metadata.court: Superior Court of the State of Delaware

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Ms. Bradshaw received treatment at St. Francis from March 26, 2020, until 5:27 a.m. on April 9, 2020, when she suffered a cardiac incident and was pronounced dead.
evidence_index.summary: Ms. Bradshaw was treated at St. Francis from March 26 to April 9, 2020, when she died.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On March 26, 2020, Ms. Bradshaw was admitted to the emergency department at St. Francis in Wilmington, Delaware after displaying symptoms of COVID-19.
evidence_index.summary: Ms. Bradshaw was admitted to the ED with COVID-19 symptoms on March 26, 2020.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: She was subsequently diagnosed with COVID-19, pneumonia, and sepsis.
evidence_index.summary: Ms. Bradshaw was diagnosed with COVID-19, pneumonia, and sepsis.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Dr. Emmons, an infectious disease specialist, first saw Ms. Bradshaw on March 27, 2020.
evidence_index.summary: Dr. Emmons first saw Ms. Bradshaw on March 27, 2020.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: On April 8, 2020, at about 9:13 a.m. Ms. Bradshaw was seen by a nurse who documented a rapid worsening of Ms. Bradshaw’s condition.
evidence_index.summary: Ms. Bradshaw's condition worsened rapidly on April 8, 2020.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The scan showed a large hematoma involving the left anterior abdominal/pelvic wall musculature as well as extraperitoneal space measuring 10.7 x 19.4 x over 36 cm.
evidence_index.summary: CT scan showed a large hematoma in Ms. Bradshaw's abdomen.
evidence_index.speaker: Court finding

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Defendants’ Motions to Dismiss are DENIED.
evidence_index.summary: Defendants' motions to dismiss were denied.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's conclusion

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: Based on the well-pled allegations, there is nothing to link the use of Lovenox to Ms. Bradshaw’s COVID-19 diagnosis or treatment.
evidence_index.summary: No link found between Lovenox use and COVID-19 treatment.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's conclusion

evidence_index.verbatim_quote: The failure to diagnose, discover and treat in a timely fashion the abdominal bleed that ultimately led to [Ms. Bradshaw’s] death.
evidence_index.summary: Court notes failure to timely diagnose and treat abdominal bleed.
evidence_index.speaker: Judge's analysis

verdict_detected.key_phrase: Defendants’ Motions to Dismiss are DENIED.
